## Meeting purpose

[Discuss content production and publishing plan for Firework's website](https://fathom.video/share/o7igNWxE3MZ_Rucs2Bt4EWHWZqGtNxcj?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [8 new articles are ready to publish, focusing on interactive videos, shoppable videos, and relevant industries like beauty, fashion, e-commerce (excluding education)](https://fathom.video/share/o7igNWxE3MZ_Rucs2Bt4EWHWZqGtNxcj?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Plan to publish 7 articles this week and 10 next week, maintaining a ramping up content velocity](https://fathom.video/share/o7igNWxE3MZ_Rucs2Bt4EWHWZqGtNxcj?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [Ensure articles look human-written with author names, images, proper formatting](https://fathom.video/share/o7igNWxE3MZ_Rucs2Bt4EWHWZqGtNxcj?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Coordinate with web admin Jorge/Karissa before publishing new content](https://fathom.video/share/o7igNWxE3MZ_Rucs2Bt4EWHWZqGtNxcj?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Backlink strategy to be discussed and prioritized after establishing a stable content production cadence](https://fathom.video/share/o7igNWxE3MZ_Rucs2Bt4EWHWZqGtNxcj?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)

## Topics

### Content Production & Publishing

  - [8 new articles ready across relevant product topics and industries like interactive videos, shoppable videos, beauty, fashion, e-commerce](https://fathom.video/share/o7igNWxE3MZ_Rucs2Bt4EWHWZqGtNxcj?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Will publish 7 articles this week and 10 next week as per the ramping up plan](https://fathom.video/share/o7igNWxE3MZ_Rucs2Bt4EWHWZqGtNxcj?tab=summary&timestamp=1019.0)
  - [Need to add author names, images, formatting to make articles look human-written](https://fathom.video/share/o7igNWxE3MZ_Rucs2Bt4EWHWZqGtNxcj?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Coordinate publishing schedule with web admin Jorge/Karissa to avoid overwhelming them](https://fathom.video/share/o7igNWxE3MZ_Rucs2Bt4EWHWZqGtNxcj?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)

### Tracking Performance

  - [Will track organic traffic, impressions, CTR in Google Search Console once articles go live](https://fathom.video/share/o7igNWxE3MZ_Rucs2Bt4EWHWZqGtNxcj?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [Expect initial trickle of traffic in first few days, then compounding growth similar to other client examples shown](https://fathom.video/share/o7igNWxE3MZ_Rucs2Bt4EWHWZqGtNxcj?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
  - [Focus first on establishing stable content velocity before optimizing for search rankings](https://fathom.video/share/o7igNWxE3MZ_Rucs2Bt4EWHWZqGtNxcj?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)

### Backlink Strategy

  - [Currently have some backlinks from customers using "Powered by Firework"](https://fathom.video/share/o7igNWxE3MZ_Rucs2Bt4EWHWZqGtNxcj?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
  - [Dedicated backlink strategy to be discussed and prioritized after establishing consistent content publishing cadence](https://fathom.video/share/o7igNWxE3MZ_Rucs2Bt4EWHWZqGtNxcj?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)
  - [Two approaches: 1) Outreach to relevant sites 2) Earning organic backlinks through high-quality content](https://fathom.video/share/o7igNWxE3MZ_Rucs2Bt4EWHWZqGtNxcj?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)

### Shopify App Ranking

  - [Firework's Shopify app listing not ranking well for relevant terms like "shoppable video"](https://fathom.video/share/o7igNWxE3MZ_Rucs2Bt4EWHWZqGtNxcj?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
  - [Separate from core SEO engagement, but suggestions requested on improving Shopify search visibility](https://fathom.video/share/o7igNWxE3MZ_Rucs2Bt4EWHWZqGtNxcj?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)
  - [High-level tips to be provided on key factors like reviews, descriptions etc.](https://fathom.video/share/o7igNWxE3MZ_Rucs2Bt4EWHWZqGtNxcj?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)

## Next Steps
